title: Latvia marks 12 years since Russia's fake Crimea referendums
summary_full: March 16th, 2026 marks twelve years since Russia staged bogus referendums on the annexation of Ukrainian territories to the Russian Federation in the Autonomous Republic of Crimea and the city of Sevastopol.
summary_public: March 16th, 2026 marks twelve years since Russia staged bogus referendums on the annexation of Ukrainian territories to the Russian Federation in the Autonomous Republic of Crimea and the city of Sevastopol.

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: Latvia marks 12 years since Russia's fake Crimea referendums

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia staged bogus referendums on the annexation of Ukrainian territories
